---
title: "Contact"
---

Thank you for visiting my portfolio website.

I welcome opportunities to connect regarding insurance, analytics, business strategy, and professional collaboration.

- Email: [hglt1995@bu.edu](mailto:hglt1995@bu.edu)
- LinkedIn: [View Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOUR-LINK)
- GitHub: [View Projects](https://github.com/haydnthomasgit)
